### Restoring a Vintage Sun SPARCstation IPX: Power Supply and NVRAM Repair

* Detailed restoration guide for a 1991 Sun Microsystems SPARCstation IPX, a compact UNIX workstation that originally cost $15,000
* Hardware specs include 40MHz SPARC RISC CPU, up to 64MB RAM, Sun Turbo GX graphics, SCSI drive, and 10M Ethernet
* Common failure mode: electrolytic capacitors in the power supply, particularly affecting IPX and IPC models
* PSU repair involves replacing all electrolytic capacitors except the main line-side filter capacitor
* Parts used include Nichicon 470μF 25V, Panasonic 3300μF 10V, and Wurth Elektronik 47μF and 1μF 50V capacitors
* Historical context: UNIX workstations dominated high-performance computing in early 1990s, offering true multitasking and superior stability compared to Windows 3.x
* Sun workstations were popular for Internet infrastructure (DNS, FTP, email, web servers) and specialized applications
* SPARC architecture featured MMU with 8x hardware contexts optimized for multitasking performance

### 修复老式 Sun SPARCstation IPX:电源和 NVRAM 维修

* 详细修复 1991 年 Sun Microsystems SPARCstation IPX 的指南,这是一台紧凑型 UNIX 工作站,原价 15,000 美元
* 硬件规格包括 40MHz SPARC RISC CPU、最高 64MB RAM、Sun Turbo GX 图形卡、SCSI 驱动器和 10M 以太网
* 常见故障模式:电源中的电解电容器失效,特别影响 IPX 和 IPC 型号
* 电源维修涉及更换除主线侧滤波电容器外的所有电解电容器
* 使用的零件包括 Nichicon 470μF 25V、Panasonic 3300μF 10V 以及 Wurth Elektronik 47μF 和 1μF 50V 电容器
* 历史背景:UNIX 工作站在 1990 年代初主导高性能计算领域,相比 Windows 3.x 提供真正的多任务处理和卓越的稳定性
* Sun 工作站广泛用于互联网基础设施(DNS、FTP、电子邮件、Web 服务器)和专业应用
* SPARC 架构具有 8 倍硬件上下文的 MMU,针对多任务性能进行了优化

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.rs-online.com/designspark/restoring-a-sun-sparcstation-ipx-part-1-psu-and-nvram)**

### FontCrafter: Free Handwriting Font Creation Tool

* **Custom font naming** - Name your personalized handwriting font and optionally add designer metadata
* **Ligature support** - Enable natural-looking connected letter pairs for authentic handwriting flow
* **Descender control** - Toggle characters that extend below the baseline (g, j, p, q, y, slashed zero)
* **Multi-language diacritics** - Auto-generate accented characters for European languages including French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, and Scandinavian
* **Three-row template system** - Flexible layout for creating comprehensive character sets

### FontCrafter:免费手写字体创建工具

* **自定义字体命名** - 为个性化手写字体命名,可选添加设计师元数据
* **连字支持** - 启用自然连接的字母对,呈现真实手写流畅感
* **下伸部控制** - 切换基线下延伸字符(g, j, p, q, y, 斜线零)
* **多语言变音符号** - 自动生成欧洲语言重音字符,涵盖法语、德语、西班牙语、葡萄牙语和斯堪的纳维亚语系
* **三行模板系统** - 灵活布局创建完整字符集

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://arcade.pirillo.com/fontcrafter.html)**


## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai - Official Google Cloud Generative AI Sample Repository

* Comprehensive collection of Jupyter notebooks, code samples, and sample apps demonstrating how to build generative AI workflows using Google Cloud's Vertex AI platform, with a focus on the Gemini model family (including the newly released Gemini 3.1 Pro)
* Key features include organized sections for Gemini experimentation, Vertex AI Search integration, RAG/Grounding implementations, Imagen vision capabilities (image generation/editing, visual Q&A), Chirp audio processing, and complete environment setup guides for Colab and Vertex AI Workbench
* Notable for being Google's official learning resource with 1,291 stars today, offering production-ready patterns across multiple AI modalities (text, vision, audio), extensive links to related Google Cloud AI repositories (Agent Development Kit, marketing/developer productivity solutions), and serving as the go-to reference for developers building on Google's generative AI stack

### GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai - Google Cloud 生成式 AI 官方示例仓库

* 功能介绍:全面的 Jupyter 笔记本、代码示例和应用程序集合,展示如何使用 Google Cloud 的 Vertex AI 平台构建生成式 AI 工作流,重点关注 Gemini 模型系列(包括新发布的 Gemini 3.1 Pro)
* 主要特点:包含 Gemini 实验、Vertex AI Search 集成、RAG/Grounding 实现、Imagen 视觉功能(图像生成/编辑、视觉问答)、Chirp 音频处理等组织良好的模块,以及 Colab 和 Vertex AI Workbench 的完整环境配置指南
* 为何值得关注:作为 Google 官方学习资源今日获得 1,291 星标,提供跨多种 AI 模态(文本、视觉、音频)的生产级模式,包含大量相关 Google Cloud AI 仓库链接(Agent Development Kit、营销/开发者生产力解决方案),是在 Google 生成式 AI 技术栈上构建应用的首选参考资料

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai)**

### OpenClaw - Self-Hosted Personal AI Assistant Across All Your Messaging Platforms

* **What it does**: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant that runs entirely on your own devices and integrates with 20+ messaging platforms (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Teams, and more). It provides voice interaction on macOS/iOS/Android, a live visual Canvas workspace, and a local-first gateway that acts as a unified control plane for all your AI interactions.

* **Key features**: Multi-channel inbox supporting 20+ platforms; voice wake words and continuous talk mode; agent-driven live Canvas with visual workspace; multi-agent routing for isolated workspaces; CLI wizard for easy onboarding; security-first DM pairing system; companion apps for macOS, iOS, and Android; extensible tool system (browser, cron, sessions); works with OpenAI and multiple model providers.

* **Why it's notable**: With 9,123 stars today, OpenClaw stands out as a privacy-focused alternative to cloud-based AI assistants. It's fully self-hosted, cross-platform (macOS, Linux, Windows via WSL2), and brings enterprise-grade features like multi-agent routing and session management to personal use. The project is backed by major sponsors (OpenAI, Vercel, Blacksmith, Convex) and offers a production-ready solution for developers who want complete control over their AI assistant without vendor lock-in.

---

### OpenClaw - 跨平台自托管个人 AI 助手

* **功能介绍**: OpenClaw 是一个完全运行在你自己设备上的个人 AI 助手,可集成 20 多个消息平台(WhatsApp、Telegram、Slack、Discord、Signal、iMessage、Teams 等)。支持 macOS/iOS/Android 上的语音交互,提供实时可视化 Canvas 工作区,以及作为统一控制平面的本地优先网关。

* **主要特点**: 支持 20+ 平台的多渠道收件箱;语音唤醒词和连续对话模式;AI 驱动的实时 Canvas 可视化工作区;多智能体路由实现工作区隔离;CLI 向导简化配置流程;安全优先的 DM 配对系统;macOS、iOS 和 Android 配套应用;可扩展工具系统(浏览器、定时任务、会话管理);支持 OpenAI 及多种模型提供商。

* **为何值得关注**: 今日获得 9,123 星标,OpenClaw 作为注重隐私的云端 AI 助手替代方案脱颖而出。完全自托管、跨平台(macOS、Linux、Windows via WSL2),将企业级功能(多智能体路由、会话管理)带入个人使用场景。项目获得主要赞助商(OpenAI、Vercel、Blacksmith、Convex)支持,为希望完全掌控 AI 助手且无供应商锁定的开发者提供生产就绪的解决方案。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)**

### MiroFish - AI-Powered Swarm Intelligence Prediction Engine

* What it does: MiroFish creates high-fidelity parallel digital worlds populated by thousands of autonomous AI agents with independent personalities, memories, and behaviors. Users upload seed data (news, policies, financial signals, or even novels) and describe prediction needs in natural language—the system then simulates future scenarios through agent interactions and delivers detailed prediction reports with an interactive digital sandbox.

* Key features: Multi-agent simulation engine powered by OASIS framework; GraphRAG-based knowledge graph construction; dual-platform parallel simulation with temporal memory updates; interactive "god mode" for dynamic variable injection; supports both macro-level policy/PR testing and micro-level creative storytelling; includes live demo showcasing public opinion prediction and literary ending speculation (e.g., predicting lost chapters of "Dream of the Red Chamber").

* Why it's notable: Backed by Shanda Group, this project gained 2,222 stars today by offering a unique approach to prediction—moving beyond traditional forecasting to emergent behavior modeling through swarm intelligence. It bridges serious decision-making tools (policy rehearsal, financial forecasting) with creative applications (novel plot prediction), making complex multi-agent systems accessible through simple natural language interfaces. The bilingual support and Docker deployment lower barriers for both Chinese and international developers.

---

### MiroFish - 基于群体智能的 AI 预测引擎

* 功能介绍: MiroFish 通过多智能体技术构建高保真平行数字世界,其中数千个具备独立人格、记忆和行为逻辑的 AI 智能体自由交互演化。用户只需上传种子材料(新闻、政策、金融信号或小说)并用自然语言描述预测需求,系统即可通过智能体互动模拟未来场景,输出详尽预测报告和可交互的数字沙盘。

* 主要特点: 基于 OASIS 框架的多智能体仿真引擎;GraphRAG 知识图谱构建;双平台并行模拟与时序记忆动态更新;"上帝视角"动态变量注入;支持宏观层面的政策/公关预演和微观层面的创意推演;提供在线 Demo 展示舆情预测和文学结局推演(如预测《红楼梦》失传结局)等实际案例。

* 为何值得关注: 获盛大集团战略支持,今日新增 2,222 星标。该项目通过群体涌现行为建模突破传统预测局限,将严肃决策工具(政策预演、金融预测)与创意应用(小说情节推演)相结合,用简洁的自然语言交互降低复杂多智能体系统的使用门槛。双语支持和 Docker 部署方式便于中外开发者快速上手体验。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### autoresearch - Autonomous AI Agent for LLM Research Experiments

* **What it does**: Enables AI agents to autonomously conduct machine learning research by iteratively modifying training code, running 5-minute experiments, and keeping improvements overnight—essentially automating the research loop for small-scale LLM training on a single GPU.

* **Key features**: Simplified single-GPU GPT training setup based on nanochat; agents modify only `train.py` (model architecture, hyperparameters, optimizer); fixed 5-minute time budget per experiment for fair comparison; human-editable `program.md` for agent instructions; supports ~100 experiments overnight (~12/hour); uses validation bits-per-byte metric for vocab-independent evaluation.

* **Why it's notable**: Created by Andrej Karpathy, this project explores a provocative vision of AI-driven research where agents autonomously iterate on code while humans "program" the research organization through markdown instructions—a glimpse into self-improving AI research systems. With 14K+ stars, it's sparked significant interest in autonomous experimentation and has inspired platform-specific forks for MacOS and Windows.

---

### autoresearch - 自主 AI 智能体驱动的 LLM 研究实验

* **功能介绍**: 让 AI 智能体自主进行机器学习研究,通过迭代修改训练代码、运行 5 分钟实验并保留改进结果——本质上是在单 GPU 上自动化小规模 LLM 训练的研究循环,可在夜间无人值守运行。

* **主要特点**: 基于 nanochat 的简化单 GPU GPT 训练设置;智能体仅修改 `train.py`(模型架构、超参数、优化器);每次实验固定 5 分钟时间预算以确保公平对比;人类可编辑 `program.md` 来指导智能体;支持夜间约 100 次实验(每小时约 12 次);使用验证比特率指标进行词汇表无关评估。

* **为何值得关注**: 由 Andrej Karpathy 创建,该项目探索了一个颇具前瞻性的愿景——AI 驱动的研究,智能体自主迭代代码而人类通过 Markdown 指令"编程"研究组织——展现了自我改进 AI 研究系统的雏形。获得 14K+ 星标,引发了对自主实验的广泛兴趣,并催生了 MacOS 和 Windows 等平台的衍生版本。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch)**

### SwiftUI-Agent-Skill - AI-Powered SwiftUI Code Quality Enhancement Tool

* **What it does**: An agent skill that integrates with AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor) to help developers write better SwiftUI code by providing real-time guidance on API usage, design patterns, performance optimization, and accessibility compliance.

* **Key features**: 
  - Easy installation via npx command for multiple AI coding platforms
  - Built on years of practical SwiftUI experience from Hacking with Swift
  - Targets common LLM mistakes like deprecated APIs, VoiceOver accessibility issues, and performance problems
  - Supports both command-based (`/swiftui-pro`) and natural language triggers
  - Can perform focused reviews on specific aspects (API deprecation, accessibility, performance)
  - Uses the Agent Skills format for broad compatibility

* **Why it's notable**: Created by Paul Hudson (@twostraws), a renowned Swift educator, this tool addresses a critical gap in AI-assisted coding—LLMs often generate syntactically correct but suboptimal SwiftUI code. With 1,537 stars, it's gaining traction as developers recognize the value of embedding expert knowledge directly into their AI workflows, ensuring modern best practices and avoiding common pitfalls that AI tools frequently make.

---

### SwiftUI-Agent-Skill - AI 驱动的 SwiftUI 代码质量增强工具

* **功能介绍**: 一个可集成到 AI 编码助手(Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor)的智能技能包,通过提供 API 使用、设计模式、性能优化和无障碍访问方面的实时指导,帮助开发者编写更优质的 SwiftUI 代码。

* **主要特点**:
  - 通过 npx 命令轻松安装到多个 AI 编码平台
  - 基于 Hacking with Swift 多年的 SwiftUI 实战经验构建
  - 针对 LLM 常见错误(如过时 API、VoiceOver 无障碍问题、性能缺陷)进行检查
  - 支持命令式(`/swiftui-pro`)和自然语言触发方式
  - 可针对特定方面(API 弃用、无障碍、性能)进行专项审查
  - 采用 Agent Skills 格式,具有广泛兼容性

* **为何值得关注**: 由知名 Swift 教育者 Paul Hudson(@twostraws)创建,该工具填补了 AI 辅助编码的关键空白——LLM 经常生成语法正确但不够优化的 SwiftUI 代码。凭借 1,537 星标,它正受到开发者青睐,因为它能将专家知识直接嵌入 AI 工作流程,确保遵循现代最佳实践并避免 AI 工具常犯的错误。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/twostraws/SwiftUI-Agent-Skill)**

### 🎬 Become the best programmer
**Channel:** Matty McTech

* What the video covers: The video introduces a platform that offers learning opportunities for over 80 programming languages with a gamified, path-based approach
* Key topics discussed: Interactive coding education, language-agnostic learning platform, Duolingo-style programming practice methodology
* Why it's worth watching: If you're looking to expand your programming language repertoire or prefer a structured, gamified learning experience, this video showcases a comprehensive platform that makes learning multiple languages accessible and engaging
